<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Lcobucci\JWT; use Lcobucci\JWT\Validation\Constraint; use Lcobucci\JWT\Validation\NoConstraintsGiven; use Lcobucci\JWT\Validation\RequiredConstraintsViolated; interface Validator { /** * @throws RequiredConstraintsViolated * @throws NoConstraintsGiven */ public function assert(Token $token, Constraint ...$constraints): void; /** @throws NoConstraintsGiven */ public function validate(Token $token, Constraint ...$constraints): bool; }
